titleStmt.title: SII 15.257: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 257. (B.K. No. 433 of 1926.) AMMINBHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in the backyard of a barber's house.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Āshāḍha śu. 11, corresponding to 1547 A.D., June 28.
It records the remission of taxes on barbers of the Amminabhāvi area in Haṟagalesīme, at the representation of Timmōja, Koṇḍōja and Bhadrōja by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Śrīrangarāja and Rāmarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaru
śa 1469 plavaṁga saṁvatsarada Āśāḍa su 11 lū śrīmaṁnma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra sadāsivadē
va mahārāyaru vijeyanāgaradalu vijeyasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi pri
thvīrājyavanu Āḷuttayiralu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāyasthāpanā
cā¨ryya śrīraṁgarāja rāmarājadēvamahaArasugaḷu haṟaga
leya sīmage saluva Aṁminabāviya saluva grāmavanu grāmada gauḍa
sēnabōvarige prajegaḷige seṭi paṭṭaṇaseṭigaḷige nirūpa sadāsivadē
va mahārāyaru ka[¨rnā]ṭaka vijeyānagara siṁhvāsanakke saluva rāyarājyadoḷa
ge [Ā] nāviṁdara teṟigenu tiṁmōja koṁḍōja bhadrōjagaḷigeteṟige sa
¨rvamānyavāgi pālisadaru niṁma Aṁminabāviya sīmeyoḷage saluva grā
mavaragrāmagaḷa nāviṁda teṟige Anīka Akālacakra biṭi begā
sa[¨rvamānya]vāgi naḍasikoṁḍu bahudu yidakke tappidare sadāśivarāyara
nimage Āgnebahu . ppikoṁḍare
damaged
Digital edition of SII 15.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
